recommendations.title: Dance-Off
recommendations.overview: Two cross-town rival dance teams go head to head for the National Nationals Championship.

recommendations.title: Charming
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Comedy, Family, Fantasy, Music, Romance
recommendations.overview: Three fairy tale princesses find themselves engaged to the same guy, Prince Charming.

recommendations.title: Condorito: The Movie
recommendations.overview: Condorito must find a way to rescue his mother in law from an ancient race of aliens which wants to enslave the universe once again.

recommendations.title: Cars 2
recommendations.overview: Star race car Lightning McQueen and his pal Mater head overseas to compete in the World Grand Prix race. But the road to the championship becomes rocky as Mater gets caught up in an intriguing adventure of his own: international espionage.

recommendations.title: Balloon

recommendations.title: Música
recommendations.overview: A young man, plagued by the music in his head, has to come to terms with an uncertain future while balancing love, family and Brazilian culture in Newark, New Jersey.

recommendations.title: Trouble
recommendations.overview: A pampered dog named Trouble must learn to live in the real world while trying to escape from his former owner's greedy children and must learn how to survive on the big-city streets.

recommendations.title: Blue's Big City Adventure
recommendations.overview: When Josh gets the opportunity of a lifetime to audition for Rainbow Puppy’s Broadway musical, Josh and Blue skidoo to NYC for the very first time where they meet new friends and discover the magic of music, dance, and following one’s dreams.

recommendations.title: Next Avengers: Heroes of Tomorrow
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Action, Adventure, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: The children of the Avengers hone their powers and go head to head with the very enemy responsible for their parents' demise.
